div.head: 162. Editorial Note
div.p: For text of National Security Action Memorandum No. 104, October 13, 1961, see United States-Vietnam Relations, 1945-1967, Book 11, page 328.NSAM No. 104 was transmitted to the Secretaries of State and Defense and the Director of Central Intelligence in a memorandum from McGeorge Bundy that conveyed the results of Presidential directives on Viet-Nam approved on October 11.
